moved_logic_domains.change: Confirm now accepts explicit checkbox value from popover, removing stale-state risk.
Message delete payload expanded with messageId+id+with/userId for backend compatibility.
On local message delete, dialogs lastMessage is updated immediately if deleted message was previewed.

detected_risks: Fallback payload broadening may hide backend schema drift; API route still validates and rejects invalid deletes.
Local lastMessage replacement uses current thread snapshot and may differ from server order until refresh.
notes: Validation: pnpm eslint on touched dm files passed.
Note: full pnpm build currently fails in workspace due unrelated missing page modules (/ads, /academy).
